'''''Return of the Jedi''''' was the ninth expansion card pack made for the [[Star Wars Trading Card Game]] produced by [[Wizards of the Coast]], based on [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. This expansion also contains cards based on elements from [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']], [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. The set was released on [[October 6]], [[2004]].

This expansion contains 110 cards.
